audit_items.proof_trace: The code correctly implements monotonically non-increasing priceMultiplier decay: at t=0 it equals startingPriceMultiplier; at t=auctionDuration it equals endingPriceMultiplier; integer mulDiv rounding is applied to the subtracted term so the multiplier is provably non-increasing under all integer arithmetic. Configuration enforcement at line 653 ensures endingPriceMultiplier ≤ startingPriceMultiplier. The formal assertion direction in the property spec (≤) is inverted relative to actual behavior (earlier time produces higher assetOutAmount, i.e., ≥), but this reflects a spec-writing error — the code behavior matches the textual description 'decay' and the design intent.
